incorrects.description: Student set incorrect bar height on first attempt

steps.text: Not quite. Check the axis. Where is 20?

incorrects.description: Student set incorrect bar height on second attempt

params.description: The number 20 highlights on the axis.

steps.text: Here's what helps: the axis counts by 5s. Find 20 on those numbers and set the bar so it ends right there.

incorrects.description: Student set incorrect bar height three or more times. System models the answer.

params.description: Pizza bar extends upward to height 20, demonstrating correct placement.

steps.text: Let me show you. Pizza has 20 votes. I look at the axis: 5, 10, 15, 20. I set the bar so it ends at 20. The bar height matches the value. That is how you use the axis to place a bar correctly.
